rootFont: Atlassian Sans, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, system-ui, Segoe UI, Ubuntu, ...
atlaskitNotePassed: Catalyst's components don't pass testId props to Atlaskit primitives, so [data-testid] absence is not proof of bespoke components. Class-hash audit shows Compiled CSS hashes (e.g. _ymio1r31) — likely Atlaskit v8+ in places.

tabs.background: active blue pill, inactive white pill
tabs.underline: none — active distinguished by bg only

toolbar.groupBtn: MISSING (D7) — group by control likely embedded in dropdown rather than toolbar pill

table.note: Cells are <td>, NOT role=gridcell. Atlaskit @atlaskit/dynamic-table or react-base-table with gridcell roles would expose 364+ role=gridcell on Jira.

h1Summary.text: External URL Behavior (Landing + Senaei Post login) [QUEUE LIVE TEST]

statusPillButton.note: Three-layer DOM stack rendering 'In Progress' three times. Inner span has Atlaskit-like uppercase+caps style but TEXT is sentence case 'In Progress' not 'IN PROGRESS'. Wrapper bg #E9F2FE not Atlaskit canonical #DEEBFF.

rightRail.secondStatusPillNote: At current rail scroll position only ONE 'In Progress' rendering exists (y:491 quick-actions row). Sidebar Status field may have been removed already; verify with sidebar=showHeaderStatusDropdown branch in StoryDetailModal.

typography.h1Page: Atlassian Sans 20px/600 rgb(41,42,46) — Jira is 20px/653 (P1 weight drift -53)
typography.tabs: Atlassian Sans 13px/500-600 — Jira tabs are 14px/500 (size+paradigm drift)
typography.subtle: rgb(80,82,88) and rgb(107,110,118) both used — matches Jira
typography.rgb15_23_42: rgb(15,23,42) appears in lozenge inner — that's Catalyst --cp-text-primary #0F172A NOT Atlaskit token. P1 token drift.

openIssues.D1_tabsParadigm: type-filter pills (Catalyst) vs view-mode links (Jira) — different mental model
openIssues.D2_pageHeader: Catalyst H1 'Backlog' vs Jira full project header (avatar, name, action icons)
openIssues.D4_commentsCell: Catalyst row has empty comments cell (160w) vs Jira '1 comment' + icon
openIssues.D7_groupBtn: missing on Catalyst toolbar (group is part of header pills not toolbar)
openIssues.D8_breadcrumbWrap: ProjectHub > BAU wraps to next line; Backlog ends up on its own row
openIssues.D9_queueLiveTest: [QUEUE LIVE TEST] suffix in title — data, transient
openIssues.D10_secondStatusPill: appears already removed — only one pill in rail at y:491
openIssues.D11_typography: page-h1 weight 600 vs Jira 653; tabs 13px vs 14px; lozenge inner color uses --cp-* not --ds-*
